---
title: "IV PASI Data Exploration"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Setup and Data Loading

```{r}
rm(list=ls())

#i use this rather than library() to load packagess.
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, #I use tidyverse when possible
               sjlabelled #for label functions
               )

#this is the dataframe. we are working in a rproj so full file path is not necessary.
df <- readRDS("df_full_panel_both_samples.rds")

# Check dimensions
cat("Data dimensions:", nrow(df), "rows x", ncol(df), "columns\n")
```

## Create Sample Dataframe

```{r}
# Randomly sample 100 rows for inspection
set.seed(42) # for reproducibility
df_sample <- df %>% slice_sample(n = 100)

# Save as CSV
write_csv(df_sample, "sample_100_rows.csv")
cat("Sample saved to sample_100_rows.csv\n")
```

## Create Codebook

```{r}
# Function to create a searchable dataset of variable names and labels
svy_dict <- function(x, ...) {
  dict <- tibble::tibble(
    var_names = colnames(x),
    var_labs = sjlabelled::get_label(x),
    var_vals = sjlabelled::get_values(x),
    val_labs = sjlabelled::get_labels(x, values = "n"),
    ...
  )
  return(dict)
}

# Create the codebook
codebook <- svy_dict(df)

# Save as CSV (converting list columns to character for CSV compatibility)
codebook_csv <- codebook %>%
  mutate(
    var_vals = sapply(var_vals, function(x) paste(x, collapse = "; ")),
    val_labs = sapply(val_labs, function(x) paste(names(x), x, sep = "=", collapse = "; "))
  )

write_csv(codebook_csv, "codebook.csv")
cat("Codebook saved to codebook.csv\n")
cat("Total variables:", nrow(codebook), "\n")
```

```{r}
# Preview codebook structure
head(codebook_csv, 20)
```

## Key Variables for IV Analysis

```{r}
# Key variables identified for the benefit timing / government attitudes project

cat("=== DATA DIMENSIONS ===\n")
cat("Rows:", nrow(df), "\n")
cat("Columns:", ncol(df), "\n")
cat("Waves:", paste(unique(df$wave), collapse = ", "), "\n")

cat("\n=== SAMPLE COMPOSITION ===\n")
cat("Immigrants:", sum(df$immigrant == TRUE), "\n")
cat("Non-immigrants:", sum(df$immigrant == FALSE), "\n")

cat("\n=== DATE VARIABLES ===\n")
cat("startdate (survey start): character, e.g.", df$startdate[1], "\n")
cat("enddate (survey end): character\n")
cat("recordeddate: character\n")

cat("\n=== BENEFIT PROGRAM VARIABLES (mprog_*) ===\n")
mprog_cols <- names(df)[grepl("^mprog_", names(df)) & !grepl("txt|dk", names(df))]
print(mprog_cols)

cat("\n=== KEY OUTCOME VARIABLES ===\n")
cat("Trust variables (0-10 scale):\n")
trust_cols <- names(df)[grepl("^trust_", names(df))]
print(trust_cols)

cat("\nFinancial satisfaction (0-10 scale):\n")
cat("- current_financialsatisf\n")
cat("- origin_financalsatisf (for immigrants, home country)\n")
cat("- future_financalsitu\n")
```

## Benefit Receipt Summary

```{r}
# Create any_benefit indicator
benefit_cols <- mprog_cols[!grepl("none", mprog_cols)]
df <- df %>%
  mutate(any_benefit = rowSums(!is.na(select(., all_of(benefit_cols)))) > 0)

cat("=== BENEFIT RECEIPT RATES ===\n")
for(col in benefit_cols) {
  n <- sum(!is.na(df[[col]]))
  cat(sprintf("%s: %d\n", col, n))
}

cat("\n=== ANY BENEFIT INDICATOR ===\n")
print(table(df$any_benefit, df$immigrant))
```

## Day of Month Distribution

```{r}
library(lubridate)

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    survey_date = as.POSIXct(startdate),
    day_of_month = day(survey_date)
  )

cat("Day of month distribution:\n")
print(table(df$day_of_month, useNA = "ifany"))
```
